payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark wooden single-panel cabinet door with a recessed border and a small rectangular handle near the top; surface has a matte finish with subtle scuffing and a lighter central reflection; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped at the left and right, suggesting a built-in cupboard door roughly 2.0 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Tall dark wooden single-panel cabinet door with a recessed border and a small rectangular handle near the top; surface has a matte finish with subtle scuffing and a lighter central reflection; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped at the left and right, suggesting a built-in cupboard door roughly 2.0 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown wood","single-panel door","recessed border","small rectangular handle near top","matte finish","subtle scuffs/soiling","vertical full-height","edge-cropped sides"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
